overview: A functional health clinic specializing in hormonal health including menopause, perimenopause, andropause, and thyroid conditions, using bioidentical hormone replacement therapy and extended patient consultations to identify root causes.
highlights: Root cause analysis with detailed health history review
In-depth lab diagnostics via LabCorp and ZRT specialty labs
targetAudience: Patients with hormonal imbalances or thyroid issues seeking more comprehensive, personalized care than conventional providers offer.
